name: golden-hoop-spell-opencode
description: Golden Hoop Spell plugin port for OpenCode — a multi-role plan dispatcher with codegraph-powered context extraction.
//devSystemDependencies: python3 — Required ONLY by the equivalence test suite (test/equivalence/*.test.ts)
which invokes the source plugin's Python scripts as the equivalence oracle.
Not a runtime dependency; install via your system package manager (e.g.
`brew install python`, `apt install python3`). The tests find it on PATH.
